title: SEM gold coat protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"876n0","text":"Protocol for how to the gold coater for SEM samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Lift glass unit – hold it together and set it to the side.
Add samples on the silicon chip and mounted post.
Turn pump on (switch on the left).
Pump for a couple of minutes.
Gas leak – bleed argon for 2 – 3 cycles. Open and close the knob – it will go between 2 and 4 on the needle.
Open gas leak valve – go fast, but not too fast.
Bring the number to around 18 then hit the start button.
creator: Eadewunm
